name: council
description: The Council: an end-to-end product pipeline of committed-perspective review boards and gated builders. Decide, spec, build, and polish any app, each stage run by seats that debate and adversarially verify before anything ships.

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: The Council: ui-board (design review), business-council (venture and requirements), forge (test-gated build of new behavior), and facelift (behavior-preserving reskin), with their adversarial verify and analyze gates. Domain-agnostic; works on any app.
